content:
🔥 RedDownloader | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Downloading media content from Reddit posts without the need for complex API setup or authentication.
✨ Key Features: • Download media (images, videos, galleries) from Reddit posts • No Reddit API authentication (praw bot) required • Single-line download function • Customizable output filename and destination path
📖 Summary: RedDownloader is a Python library designed to simplify the process of downloading various media types, including images, galleries, and videos, directly from Reddit posts. It offers an easy-to-use interface that does not require Reddit API authentication, allowing users to download content with a single line of code and customize output options like filename, destination, and video quality.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 Telegram-Media-Downloader | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To allow users to download media content from Telegram web that is otherwise restricted or unavailable for download.
✨ Key Features: • Enables downloading of images, GIFs, audio, and videos from Telegram web. • Bypasses download restrictions in chats and stories.
📖 Summary: This JavaScript user script enhances the Telegram web experience by enabling the download of media (images, GIFs, audio, videos) from chats and stories, even when downloads are restricted. It requires a user script manager browser extension for installation and use.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 grist-core | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Running a powerful server for hosting and managing relational spreadsheets.
✨ Key Features: • Relational spreadsheet model • Database-like columns (named, single data type) • Formula filling with automatic updates • Python formula support • AI Formula Assistant
📖 Summary: Grist is a modern relational spreadsheet application that combines the flexibility of a spreadsheet with the robustness of a database. The grist-core repository provides the server-side functionality for hosting and managing these advanced spreadsheets.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
